003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
024
025/**
026 * Represents a single <a class="doclink" href="https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/server-sent-events.html">Server-Sent Event</a>
027 * (SSE) frame on the wire.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Each event maps to a sequence of <c>field: value</c> lines terminated by a blank line in the
031 * <c>text/event-stream</c> wire format:
032 * <p class='bcode'>
033 * event: progress
034 * data: {"step":4,"total":10}
035 * id: 42
036 * retry: 5000
037 *
038 * </p>
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * The payload field {@link #getData() data} is a <b>pre-serialized</b> {@link String} — the SSE
042 * serializer does not compose with a delegate marshaller. Callers that need a typed payload should
043 * serialize it themselves (e.g. via {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.Json#of(Object) Json.of(x)})
044 * and assign the resulting string to {@link #setData(String) setData(...)}. The serializer will
045 * split that string on {@code \n} into multiple <c>data:</c> lines per spec.
046 *
047 * <h5 class='figure'>Example: build and serialize an event:</h5>
048 * <p class='bjava'>
049 *    SseEvent <jv>event</jv> = <jk>new</jk> SseEvent()
050 *       .setEvent(<js>"progress"</js>)
051 *       .setData(Json.<jsm>of</jsm>(Map.of(<js>"step"</js>, 4, <js>"total"</js>, 10)))
052 *       .setId(<js>"42"</js>)
053 *       .setRetry(5000L);
054 *
055 *    String <jv>wire</jv> = Sse.<jsm>of</jsm>(<jv>event</jv>);
056 * </p>
057 *
058 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
059 *    <li class='note'>This class is not thread safe.
060 * </ul>
061 *
062 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
063 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Sse">SSE Basics</a>
064 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/server-sent-events.html">WHATWG HTML §9.2 — Server-sent events</a>
065 * </ul>
066 */
067@BeanType(properties = "event,data,id,retry")
068public class SseEvent {
069
070   /** Default event-type name dispatched by the WHATWG <c>EventSource</c> when no <c>event:</c> field is present. */
071   public static final String DEFAULT_EVENT = "message";
072
073   private String event;
074   private String data;
075   private String id;
076   private Long retry;
077
078   /**
079    * Constructor.
080    */
081   public SseEvent() {}
082
083   /**
084    * Constructor.
085    *
086    * @param event The event-type name. Can be <jk>null</jk> (dispatches as {@value #DEFAULT_EVENT}).
087    * @param data The payload string. Can be <jk>null</jk> (no <c>data:</c> lines emitted).
088    */
089   public SseEvent(String event, String data) {
090      this.event = event;
091      this.data = data;
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Returns the event-type name.
096    *
097    * @return The event-type name, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
098    */
099   public String getEvent() {
100      return event;
101   }
102
103   /**
104    * Sets the event-type name.
105    *
106    * @param value The event-type name. Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset.
107    * @return This object.
108    */
109   public SseEvent setEvent(String value) {
110      event = value;
111      return this;
112   }
113
114   /**
115    * Returns the data payload (pre-serialized string).
116    *
117    * @return The data payload, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
118    */
119   public String getData() {
120      return data;
121   }
122
123   /**
124    * Sets the data payload.
125    *
126    * @param value The pre-serialized payload string. Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset.
127    * @return This object.
128    */
129   public SseEvent setData(String value) {
130      data = value;
131      return this;
132   }
133
134   /**
135    * Returns the last-event-id value.
136    *
137    * @return The id, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
138    */
139   public String getId() {
140      return id;
141   }
142
143   /**
144    * Sets the last-event-id value.
145    *
146    * @param value The id. Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset.
147    * @return This object.
148    */
149   public SseEvent setId(String value) {
150      id = value;
151      return this;
152   }
153
154   /**
155    * Returns the reconnect-delay hint in milliseconds.
156    *
157    * @return The retry value, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
158    */
159   public Long getRetry() {
160      return retry;
161   }
162
163   /**
164    * Sets the reconnect-delay hint in milliseconds.
165    *
166    * @param value The retry value. Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset.
167    * @return This object.
168    */
169   public SseEvent setRetry(Long value) {
170      retry = value;
171      return this;
172   }
173
174   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
175   public boolean equals(Object o) {
176      if (this == o)
177         return true;
178      if (!(o instanceof SseEvent o2))
179         return false;
180      return eq(event, o2.event)
181         && eq(data, o2.data)
182         && eq(id, o2.id)
183         && eq(retry, o2.retry);
184   }
185
186   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
187   public int hashCode() {
188      return Objects.hash(event, data, id, retry);
189   }
190
191   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
192   public String toString() {
193      return "SseEvent[event=" + event + ",data=" + data + ",id=" + id + ",retry=" + retry + "]";
194   }
195}
